tracks.meaning: a metal or wooden percussion instrument that produces a ringing sound when struck with a hammer or clapper
the rounded part at the end of a long bone, especially the humerus or femur
to ring a bell or cause a bell to sound
a device that rings or chimes to signal or alert someone
a flower or plant that has a bell-shaped bloom, such as a bluebell or Canterbury bell
a signal sound made on a ship to mark the passage of time during watch periods
to sound or ring like a bell or produce a clear ringing tone
an auditory alert signal or notification sound generated by a computer or terminal
a sound effect or stage cue used in theatrical productions to signal entrances or scene changes
a bell-shaped geographical feature or landform
the ringing of a bell to signal the opening or closing of a court session or legislative body
